creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
After reviewing https://jira.mariadb.org/browse/MDEV-9627 I decided to remove change to
+#OPTIONS_EXCLUDE_i386= TOKUDB
+# NOT_FOR_ARCHS=              i386
and have successfully built maria103-server on
FreeBSD 11.2-STABLE using clang 6.0.1

ie  ===>  Building package for mariadb103-server-10.3.8
# uname -aKU
FreeBSD b1.hs 11.2-STABLE FreeBSD 11.2-STABLE  r336359M  i386 1102501 1102501

You might like to consider removing the i386 limitation.
